category_sources: Official GitHub README describes radare2 as a UNIX-like reverse engineering framework and command-line toolset.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is radareorg/radare2.
docs_sources: Official radare2 GitHub README lists the Official Book at book.rada.re for r2 usage.
The book page states it is the official book of the radare project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/radareorg/radare2; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes a command-line toolset and links usage resources.
source_facts.description identifies a reverse engineering framework.
